items.title: WowWeekend
items.description: Website migration from legacy to a new system using Next.js and Payload CMS, including custom web scraping tools and Cloudflare CDN optimization.
items.goals: Migration of legacy website using PHP (FE) and ASP (Backend) to a modern Next.js + PayloadCMS stack.
features: Admin Dashboard Schema Management with PayloadCms
Product, category, article, and image management
Full ISR architecture for SEO optimization

items.title: WowBuilder
items.description: A drag-and-drop website builder allowing designers to create specialized LongForm landing pages directly in the browser.
items.goals: Create a visual builder for designers to produce landing pages without developer intervention.
features: Reusable components: spacer, container, button, etc.
Local state management with React Context

items.title: Jewellery WowWeekend
items.description: A specialized jewelry publication site with high-end UI and extreme SEO optimization, branched from the core WowWeekend system.
items.goals: Build a high-performance, visually appealing site for jewelry articles.
features: Full ISR for speed and SEO

items.title: IDM Website & Mobile App
items.description: UI/UX overhaul for legacy systems integrated with a RAG-based AI Chatbot for business consulting.

items.title: Laptop TC Store
items.description: E-commerce platform specialized in laptops with SSR/SSG architecture for ultra-fast speed and SEO excellence.

items.title: TC Phim
items.description: Online streaming channel utilizing Next.js 16 Canary features like Partial Prerendering (PPR) and React Compiler.

items.title: Auth Module (ASP.NET)
items.description: Centralized authentication module reusable for multiple personal side projects, handling user and company permissions.

items.title: Image Sharing Platform
items.description: Real-time image sharing social network with nested comments, automated image optimization, and socket notifications.

items.title: Football Player Value Predictor
items.description: Machine Learning study project: scraping data from Transfermarkt, cleaning, analyzing, and training a Decision Tree model.

items.title: Moon App
items.description: Cross-platform mobile app (Expo 54) using file-based routing and offline caching with TanStack Query.

items.title: Eco App (Payload v3)
items.description: E-commerce boilerplate integrating Payload CMS v3 with Next.js 15 App Router, Stripe payments, and i18n.

items.title: My Portfolio Website
items.description: The site you are viewing! Built with Astro's Islands Architecture and GSAP animations.
